name: DevBox Development Environment
postCreateCommand:
if [ "${GIT_NAME}" = "Developer" ] || [ "${GIT_EMAIL}" = "developer@example.com" ]; then printf '
⚠ WARNING: placeholder git identity in use. Edit GIT_NAME and GIT_EMAIL in .devcontainer/devcontainer.json and rebuild the container.

'; fi && git config --global user.name "${GIT_NAME}" && git config --global user.email "${GIT_EMAIL}" && git config --global init.defaultBranch main && git config --global core.autocrlf input
